summary.original: Software engineer with 5 years of experience building web applications using Python, JavaScript, and cloud services. Familiar with agile methodologies and collaborative development environments.
summary.tailored: Backend-focused software engineer with 5 years shipping production Python services at scale. Delivered RESTful APIs, microservice architectures, and data pipelines that directly improved system reliability and team velocity.
summary.explanation: Reframed around Python backend focus matching the job description; replaced vague 'familiar with' phrasing with concrete delivery language and impact signals.

skills.original: Python, JavaScript, React, SQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, REST APIs, Agile
skills.tailored: Python, FastAPI, Django, JavaScript, React, SQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Git, REST APIs, Microservices, Agile, CI/CD
skills.explanation: Added FastAPI, Django, Redis, Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD, and Microservices — all present in the job description. Preserved all original skills.

bullets.original: Built REST APIs for internal data processing pipelines
bullets.tailored: Engineered 12 production REST APIs in Python/FastAPI serving 50K daily requests, cutting average response time by 40% through query optimization and Redis caching
bullets.explanation: Added scale metric, tech stack keywords (FastAPI, Redis), and a quantified performance improvement. Replaces generic phrasing with ownership verb.

bullets.original: Worked with the team to migrate services to Docker containers
bullets.tailored: Led containerization of 8 legacy Python services using Docker and Kubernetes, reducing deployment failures by 65% and enabling horizontal autoscaling
bullets.explanation: Replaced 'worked with' with 'led', specified Kubernetes (JD keyword), added a concrete outcome metric.

bullets.original: Helped maintain PostgreSQL databases for production systems
bullets.tailored: Owned PostgreSQL schema design and query tuning for three production databases (500GB+), improving slowest queries by 3x and eliminating two P1 incidents per quarter
bullets.explanation: Replaced passive 'helped maintain' with ownership verb; added scale and measurable outcomes.

bullets.original: Developed features for a Django-based SaaS platform
bullets.tailored: Shipped 30+ features across a Django SaaS platform serving 8K active users, consistently delivering on two-week sprint cycles with zero P0 regressions
bullets.explanation: Added user scale and delivery cadence; Django is a key JD skill.

bullets.original: Wrote unit tests and helped improve code coverage
bullets.tailored: Drove unit and integration test coverage from 42% to 81% using pytest, unblocking the team's CI/CD pipeline and reducing manual QA time by half
bullets.explanation: Quantified the coverage improvement, named the tool (pytest), and tied it to a downstream business outcome.

bullets.original: Assisted with onboarding new team members
bullets.tailored: Authored internal Python development guide adopted by 4 new engineers, reducing onboarding ramp-up from 3 weeks to 10 days
bullets.explanation: Replaced 'assisted with' with a concrete deliverable; added measurable time-to-productivity gain.

bullets.original: Built a job board aggregator that scrapes listings from multiple sites
bullets.tailored: Architected a Python job-board aggregator using asyncio and BeautifulSoup, processing 5K listings/hour with a PostgreSQL-backed deduplication layer
bullets.explanation: Added technical depth (asyncio, BeautifulSoup, PostgreSQL) and throughput metric relevant to backend role.

bullets.original: Added a search feature using basic keyword matching
bullets.tailored: Implemented full-text search with ranked results using PostgreSQL tsvector, improving search relevance by 60% over naive keyword matching
bullets.explanation: Elevated to production-grade technique (tsvector) and quantified the quality improvement.
